Hero.headline: Orchestrating Software Engineering, Full-Stack Quality & GenAI
Hero.bio: As a Software Engineer and Quality Architect, I bridge backend, frontend, and mobile development with software quality across the entire lifecycle. I architect high-performance solutions, build robust applications, design automation frameworks, and construct intelligent GenAI agents to optimize the developer lifecycle.

role1.title: Software Engineer & Quality Architect • Itaú Unibanco
role1.description:
My trajectory at Latin America's largest bank evolved from a software engineer and quality assurance role to a Software Engineer & Quality Architect, bridging code construction with testing maturity:

• 2026 | Solution Hubs, Portal CRQ & SRE: Expanded the backend into a central Solution Hub and engineered the CRQ Portal (GitHub Pages integrating StackSpot AI Chatbots, QuickSight dashboards, and secure admin access). Architected "First Responder" workflows using Datadog and ServiceNow, automating incident triage in seconds.

• 2025 | Cloud Platforms & AI Discovery: Built a cloud Full-Stack mass data platform (Java 21 Virtual Threads, Spring Boot, Angular, ECS Fargate) that parallelized requests across 30+ credit APIs, slashing latency from 5 minutes to 7 seconds. Led benchmarks for Devin.AI and Copilot Agent Mode, pushing coverage to 90%.

• 2023-2024 | Observability & Shift-Left: Engineered SRE and telemetry solutions in the CRQ team. Led community-wide test marathons, boosting codebase coverage from 25% to 70%. Shipped intelligent service virtualization tools capable of auto-recovering API contracts during pipeline execution.

• 2020-2022 | Engineering & Modernization: Developed and optimized software in Custody and Renegotiation squads. Contributed hands-on to the Java modernization of the legacy IOF tax calculator, migrating complex Mainframe rules into clean Java code using BigDecimal to guarantee mathematical precision.
role1.skills: Platform Engineering • GenAI • Java 21 • AWS • DataDog • Python • React • Quality Engineering • Software Engineering

role2.title: Test Automation Analyst • Wipro (Fully allocated at Bradesco Bank)
role2.description:
Developed and scaled end-to-end (E2E) test automation frameworks for major digital banking applications (Next Bank) and investment platforms (Agora Investments), focusing on core mobile architecture and API reliability:

• Mobile Automation Infrastructure: Engineered robust E2E full-stack mobile testing suites, integrating execution grids via Mobile Center to cut regression cycle times.

• Multi-Layer Frameworks: Designed and maintained scalable web testing frameworks using Selenium and LeanFT paired with automated REST API validation layers via Rest-Assured.

• Cross-Functional Collaboration: Acted as the technical quality bridge between development squads and business units, accelerating release cycles while maintaining an exceptionally low production defect rate.
role2.skills: Quality Engineering • Automation • Mobile • AWS • Development

role3.title: Test Automation Analyst & Intern • RSI / Keeggo
role3.description:
Started as a technology intern and was promoted to Automation Analyst due to technical knowledge applied in projects for major clients (Santander, Rabobank, Itaú, BV, Banco Original, and Cielo):

• 2017 | Automation Analyst: Developed and optimized automated data ingestion workflows using Talend ETL to ensure test data accuracy. Assisted in building web and desktop UI test scripts under strict banking security guidelines.

• 2015-2016 | Technology Intern: Managed internal tools, optimizing departmental workflows.

postgrad.description: Specialized curriculum focusing on LLMs, Agentic AI, and Machine Learning Architecture.

project1.description: Engineered a high-performance backend utilizing Java 21 Virtual Threads and Parallel Execution Services to orchestrate payloads across 37 microservices. Slashed latency from 5 minutes to an average of 7 seconds.

blueprint.title: Foundations & Family
blueprint.content: My technical curiosity began long before I started my degree in Information Systems. I have always wanted to build solutions, drive quality, and optimize systems so they would never fail. My ultimate foundation is my family. I am happily married, share my home with my wife and our pets, and am currently preparing for the arrival of Hannah, the gift that Jesus gave us. My family forged who I am and drives me daily to be my best version, helping me grow, build responsibility, and stay committed. For every project I start, I give my absolute all and always commit to learning whatever is necessary to achieve mastery in what I deliver.

scale.title: Scale & Core Banking Ecosystem
scale.content: I spent the last decade building and scaling automation frameworks and software systems in highly complex ecosystems like those of banking institutions such as Itaú, Bradesco, Santander, Banco Original, Rabobank, Cielo, and Banco BV. I worked end-to-end in the transition, creation, and evolution of systems toward modern architectures, guaranteeing complete, high-impact deliveries that serve millions of customers daily.

frontier.title: SRE, Solutions Portal & AI Frontier
frontier.content: Within the Lending community at Itaú Unibanco, I built the CRQ Portal—a static GitHub Pages architecture equipped with AI chatbots, dashboards, runbooks, and diagnostics—centralizing tooling to support our entire community. I also developed the Solutions Hub (with Java 21, Virtual Threads, Spring Boot, and ECS Fargate), slashing the execution time for test data generation from 5 minutes to 7 seconds. Additionally, I led AI agent discoveries with Devin.AI and Copilot Agent Mode (boosting test coverage to 90% across the community's repositories) and architected the 'First Responder' SRE automation flow using Datadog Workflows and ServiceNow to triage incidents in a few minutes.

manifesto.title: The Vision: Software Engineering in the AI Era
manifesto.content:
With the rise of Generative AI, code generation speed has increased exponentially. However, the lack of consistency, testing, and robustness has become the single largest bottleneck for modern engineering organizations. Code written at warp speed without proper quality guardrails yields catastrophic technical debt.

My vision is to lead the charge in **AI-Driven Quality** and **Spec-Driven Development (SDD)**. Modern Software Engineering demands a holistic approach: bridging complex Event-Driven architectures and developer platform frameworks with isolated simulation harnesses. My multi-disciplinary background combining Software Engineering, SRE, and Quality Architecture serves as the key differentiator to anticipate production risks, ensure data security, and sustain technical decisions backed by real observability data.

data-platform.title: Enterprise Mass Data Generation Platform | Built at Itaú Unibanco
data-platform.stack: Spring Boot 4.x, Java 25, JEP 491, AWS ECS Fargate, OpenTelemetry Context Propagation, Datadog Workflows
data-platform.businessProblem: Coupled staging environments and extreme slowness (5-minute bottleneck) to orchestrate and generate consistent test data for Lending credit tests before running CI/CD pipelines.
data-platform.technicalSolution: Replacement of blocking thread pools with native Java 25 Virtual Threads. Implementation of JEP 491 (replacing internal monitors with ReentrantLock to completely eliminate thread pinning) to trigger parallel asynchronous concurrent calls against 37 internal banking APIs. Customization of OpenTelemetry propagators to maintain Trace ID traceability across Virtual Threads in ECS Fargate.
data-platform.impactMetrics: Slashed data generation latency from 5 minutes to a surgical average of 7 seconds, maximizing CPU throughput and cutting infrastructure costs.
data-platform.mermaidChart:
graph TD
  A[CI/CD Pipeline] -->|Trigger| B(Data Generator - ECS Fargate)
  B -->|Virtual Threads| C[37 Internal Banking APIs]
  C -->|OpenTelemetry| D[Datadog Workflows]
  C --> E[Lending Test Data]

reactive-banking-harness.title: Reactive Banking Test Harness & Chaos Engine | Open-Source
reactive-banking-harness.stack: Spring Boot 4.x, Java 25, Testcontainers, WireMock Docker Containers, Pact Framework (Consumer-Driven Contracts), GitHub Actions
reactive-banking-harness.description: Open-source productivity framework focused on simulating high-resilience and concurrent banking scenarios within the CI pipeline.
reactive-banking-harness.technicalSolution: Complete isolation of the testing environment using WireMock inside Testcontainers instances in GitHub Actions, eliminating network fluctuations. Implementation of contract testing using Pact Framework (Pact-JVM) to shield compatibility of downstream API signatures. Injection of Chaos Engineering (artificial latency and network packet drops via WireMock) to validate if the system's core Virtual Threads self-recover under extreme infrastructure stress.
reactive-banking-harness.mermaidChart:
graph TD
  A[GitHub Actions CI] --> B(Testcontainers)
  B --> C[WireMock Docker]
  B --> D[Pact Framework JVM]
  C -->|Chaos: Latency/Drops| E(Core System - Virtual Threads)
  D -->|Contract Testing| E
  E -->|Self Recovery| F[Resilient State]
